title: Small models need compact context packs
user_phrasing: small model gets confused by rag
canonical_summary: Small models benefit from fewer, higher-signal cards rather than large context dumps.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Explain model size, retrieval depth, confusion risk, and one compact retrieval adjustment.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Retrieval depth is part of the Atlas Contract
user_phrasing: why put retrieval depth in the name
canonical_summary: Retrieval depth describes how many cards the adapter was trained to expect in one answer context.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Define D as expected card depth and why it matters.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: One primary lane before secondary lanes
canonical_summary: Small models should usually receive one primary lane first, then secondary support only when needed.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Distractor control is a training target
canonical_summary: Controlled distractor cards teach the adapter not to over-trust irrelevant retrieved context.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Explain why controlled distractors are useful for training and scoring.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Small model blends two lanes
user_phrasing: model mixed up vram and socket errors
canonical_summary: Small models may blend lanes when context contains competing cards without clear priority.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Reduce retrieval depth and add do-not-confuse guidance.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Small model follows the distractor card
canonical_summary: If the model answers from a distractor, retrieval ranking or source-priority cues may be weak.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Identify the distractor and improve ranking or card clarity.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Correct card but generic answer
user_phrasing: it had the card but gave generic advice
canonical_summary: A model may retrieve the right card but fail to use its answer pattern if examples are weak.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Tighten answer-pattern card and add training records.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Too many cards vs weak cards
user_phrasing: too much context or bad cards
canonical_summary: Large contradictory context suggests reducing depth; small unhelpful context suggests rewriting cards.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Branch between context overload and card-quality failure.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Small-model issue vs base capability limit
canonical_summary: If the task needs many-lane synthesis, the model may be too small; bounded lane tasks should be testable.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Separate bounded lane tasks from broad reasoning tasks.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Trust evaluation over intuition
user_phrasing: how do we know depth is right
canonical_summary: Retrieval depth and card-count choices should be validated by evaluation, not preference.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Use scored results to justify retrieval-depth decisions.
exactness_guard: Do not present 5D as proven before testing.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Do not confuse small-model mode with dumbing down
user_phrasing: does small model mode mean dumbing it down
canonical_summary: Small-model mode is a stricter retrieval contract, not a claim that the system is less capable.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Explain that stricter structure improves legibility.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: How to answer small-model retrieval questions
canonical_summary: Responses should name model size, context depth, confusion risk, and a concrete retrieval/card adjustment.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Use: model size -> context depth -> risk -> adjustment.
exactness_guard: Do not invent exact commands, paths, class names, model names, or source claims without retrieved evidence.
